column1: # limitations: Real MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database records (PhysioNet
column2: ODC-By v1.0). | Rate-regime triage only — Normal / Tachy / Brady / Irregular. Does NOT classify AAMI N/S/V/F/Q morphology
column7: ST-elevation. | Ground truth derived from annotation RR intervals via a 5-beat sliding window (mitbih::rate_regime_truth); not a clinician rhythm label. | AAMI EC57:2012 inter-patient evaluation on the DS2 split. CricketBrain has no training phase
column8: so DS1/DS2 are used purely to define a canonical record list. | Not a medical device. Not validated for clinical use. Research / embedded pre-screening prototype only.
